description: Ten prompt-level evals covering FLStudioMCP domain-tool selection, rollback discipline, API limits, and user-facing reporting.

evals.prompt: Check whether FL Studio is connected, tell me the current tempo, set it temporarily to 128 BPM as a live smoke test, then restore it.
safety_expectations: confirm controller build before live write

evals.prompt: Audit this project for export readiness and propose what you would fix first without changing anything.
safety_expectations: report blockers and rollback-safe proposed tools

evals.prompt: On the current pattern, inspect the kick channel grid and add a simple four-on-the-floor step pattern with rollback support.
safety_expectations: group step edits as one rollback unit

evals.prompt: Group the drum tracks to a drum bus, color the drums red, and solo them for checking.
safety_expectations: never include Master as a color/solo target

evals.prompt: Prepare an arrangement outline: name the next section patterns, add section markers, and mute the scratch playlist track.
safety_expectations: explain playlist clip placement is not automated

evals.prompt: Write a short D Dorian bass riff into channel 2, then transpose it up an octave if the write succeeds.
safety_expectations: mention MCP Apply arming if needed

evals.prompt: On mixer track 5, find Parametric EQ 2 and add a gentle presence boost; if no matching plugin is loaded, do not load one.
safety_expectations: write grouped plugin params with rollback

evals.prompt: Run a mix diagnosis, start a peak watch for the loud section, and apply only a safe trim-volume fix if one is explicitly proposed.
Analyze this vocal stem for tempo/key, suggest a matching preset, and plan a vocal chain from already-loaded or installed plugins.
safety_expectations: audio and preset reads are read-only
missing plugins are manual suggestions only

evals.prompt: Set channel 8 Drums native EQ to a high-pass at 120 Hz if the API supports it; if the live test fails, decide whether to remove the feature.
safety_expectations: do not promise native EQ high-pass type on unverified builds
treat documented live failure as documented-unconfirmed pending false-positive probe
